title: Multi-Agent Engine Phase 2: model block contract + spawnChild threading

AC1.note: optional model block added to BOTH subagent-dispatch.schema.json copies (parity IDENTICAL); dispatch without it still validates (gdskills suite green)

AC2.note: ChildContractExtension + harness-child-contract-extension.schema.json gained optional modelSelection; buildChildDispatchExtension conditional-spread; contract.test.ts 4 new tests

AC3.note: spawnChild resolves after policy gate (budget->policy->model); network-under-readonly & not-allowlisted denials refuse whole spawn (no extension); guard-order test

AC4.note: success carries modelSelection {providerId,modelId,source}; explicit/inherit reflected; parseDispatchModel maps dispatch block

AC5.note: backward-compat: no parentModel => no modelSelection, extension schema-valid, identical to pre-phase (regression test)

AC6.note: spawn.test.ts + contract.test.ts extended; full suite 1594 pass/0 fail incl no-optional-imports dep guard; tsc clean; determinism preserved

tasks.title: Add/adjust tests and make them pass
